case_title: VIRIDIANA MORALES VS. NORA CALDERON SALDIERNA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORALES, VIRIDIANA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORALES, VIRIDIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALDIERNA, NORA CALDERON $900.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $900.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-17-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MORALES, VIRIDIANA AS TO DEFENDANT SALDIERNA, NORA CALDERON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-17-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED OCT-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SALDIERNA, NORA CALDERON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-17-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-17-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---MARGO SEELY. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
